tasks.label: Compilar Webapp
args: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 && set PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH% && cd /d webapp && mvn -DskipTests compile

tasks.label: Package Webapp
args: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 && set PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH% && cd /d webapp && mvn -DskipTests clean package spring-boot:repackage

tasks.label: Compilar Java
args: if exist bin rmdir /s /q bin && mkdir bin && javac -cp "dist/lib/sqlite-jdbc-3.23.1.jar;dist/lib/jcalendar-1.4.jar" -d bin src\RegistoFolgas\*.java
